description_long: This dishwasher features a sleek, modern design with a matte black finish that covers its entire exterior. The front panel is dominated by a wide, horizontal handle integrated just below a digital control panel, which displays a timer and several touch-sensitive buttons. The sides and back are plain, with no visible seams or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The control panel is centrally located and slightly recessed, with clear digital readouts and icons for various wash settings. The overall form is boxy and robust, suggesting a sturdy build suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments. The dishwasher's top surface is flat, making it possible to place lightweight objects on it if needed.
description: A matte black, box-shaped dishwasher with an integrated handle and a digital control panel on the front. Its minimalist design features a flat top and smooth, unadorned sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital control panel, integrated handle, and the main access door.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless, highlighting the depth and boxy shape.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely flat and unadorned, with no visible features or access points.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, plain and featureless.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is horizontally aligned at the top front of the dishwasher, featuring a central digital display flanked by touch-sensitive buttons on both sides. The buttons are rectangular and evenly spaced, with small icons or labels indicating their functions.
attribute_door_handle_style: The door handle is a wide, horizontal bar integrated into the upper section of the front panel, flush with the surface, and finished in the same matte black color as the rest of the exterior.
attribute_visible_buttons_or_dials: There are several rectangular touch-sensitive buttons on the control panel, located to the left and right of the central digital display. No physical dials or switches are visible.
attribute_front_panel_design: The front panel is matte black with a smooth, flat finish. It features a recessed digital control panel and an integrated horizontal handle, with no decorative seams or windows.
